states.label: BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE
states.description: Candidate cannot advance because a deterministic gate, stale evidence, liquidity issue, or safety boundary blocks it.

review_resolution_requirements: reviewer must keep item blocked or request evidence
outcome_tracker_requirements: paper outcome tracker id when paper-only or closed after paper monitoring
monitor observation summary
no order or broker action reference
promotion_gate_requirements: promotion gate evidence checklist id when evaluating paper-only readiness
stale data, liquidity, safety, and human-review checks remain explicit
promotion gate cannot authorize live trading
safety_boundary_requirements: RESEARCH_ONLY, MONITOR_ONLY, PAPER_ONLY, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, and BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE labels remain available
LIVE TRADING remains DISABLED
no credential, data-provider, broker, order path, paper state, live state, or routing mutation is allowed

states.label: HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED
states.description: Candidate is trade-relevant research that needs a human reviewer before any later paper-only lifecycle change.

review_resolution_requirements: reviewer must resolve the open question before any state change
outcome_tracker_requirements: paper outcome tracker id when paper-only or closed after paper monitoring
monitor observation summary
no order or broker action reference
promotion_gate_requirements: promotion gate evidence checklist id when evaluating paper-only readiness
stale data, liquidity, safety, and human-review checks remain explicit
promotion gate cannot authorize live trading
safety_boundary_requirements: RESEARCH_ONLY, MONITOR_ONLY, PAPER_ONLY, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, and BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE labels remain available
LIVE TRADING remains DISABLED
no credential, data-provider, broker, order path, paper state, live state, or routing mutation is allowed

states.label: PAPER_ONLY
states.description: Candidate is eligible only for paper-only monitoring records and cannot route externally.

review_resolution_requirements: reviewer must confirm paper-only status remains non-routed
outcome_tracker_requirements: paper outcome tracker id when paper-only or closed after paper monitoring
monitor observation summary
no order or broker action reference
promotion_gate_requirements: promotion gate evidence checklist id when evaluating paper-only readiness
stale data, liquidity, safety, and human-review checks remain explicit
promotion gate cannot authorize live trading
safety_boundary_requirements: RESEARCH_ONLY, MONITOR_ONLY, PAPER_ONLY, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, and BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE labels remain available
LIVE TRADING remains DISABLED
no credential, data-provider, broker, order path, paper state, live state, or routing mutation is allowed

states.label: BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE
states.description: Candidate evidence is too old or incomplete for review or paper-only continuation.

review_resolution_requirements: reviewer must reject stale evidence for promotion
outcome_tracker_requirements: paper outcome tracker id when paper-only or closed after paper monitoring
monitor observation summary
no order or broker action reference
promotion_gate_requirements: promotion gate evidence checklist id when evaluating paper-only readiness
stale data, liquidity, safety, and human-review checks remain explicit
promotion gate cannot authorize live trading
safety_boundary_requirements: RESEARCH_ONLY, MONITOR_ONLY, PAPER_ONLY, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, and BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE labels remain available
LIVE TRADING remains DISABLED
no credential, data-provider, broker, order path, paper state, live state, or routing mutation is allowed

states.label: MONITOR_ONLY
states.description: Candidate duplicates a primary record and must not create a second workflow action.

review_resolution_requirements: reviewer must link the primary candidate record
outcome_tracker_requirements: paper outcome tracker id when paper-only or closed after paper monitoring
monitor observation summary
no order or broker action reference
promotion_gate_requirements: promotion gate evidence checklist id when evaluating paper-only readiness
stale data, liquidity, safety, and human-review checks remain explicit
promotion gate cannot authorize live trading
safety_boundary_requirements: RESEARCH_ONLY, MONITOR_ONLY, PAPER_ONLY, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, and BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE labels remain available
LIVE TRADING remains DISABLED
no credential, data-provider, broker, order path, paper state, live state, or routing mutation is allowed

states.label: HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED
states.description: Candidate lifecycle is terminal until a separate future phase creates a new candidate record.

review_resolution_requirements: reviewer must provide final closeout rationale
outcome_tracker_requirements: paper outcome tracker id when paper-only or closed after paper monitoring
monitor observation summary
no order or broker action reference
promotion_gate_requirements: promotion gate evidence checklist id when evaluating paper-only readiness
stale data, liquidity, safety, and human-review checks remain explicit
promotion gate cannot authorize live trading
safety_boundary_requirements: RESEARCH_ONLY, MONITOR_ONLY, PAPER_ONLY, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, and BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE labels remain available
LIVE TRADING remains DISABLED
no credential, data-provider, broker, order path, paper state, live state, or routing mutation is allowed

states.label: HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED
states.description: Candidate lacks approved offline evidence needed to resolve review or blocked status.

review_resolution_requirements: reviewer must identify the missing evidence category
outcome_tracker_requirements: paper outcome tracker id when paper-only or closed after paper monitoring
monitor observation summary
no order or broker action reference
promotion_gate_requirements: promotion gate evidence checklist id when evaluating paper-only readiness
stale data, liquidity, safety, and human-review checks remain explicit
promotion gate cannot authorize live trading
safety_boundary_requirements: RESEARCH_ONLY, MONITOR_ONLY, PAPER_ONLY, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, and BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE labels remain available
LIVE TRADING remains DISABLED
no credential, data-provider, broker, order path, paper state, live state, or routing mutation is allowed
